Home-swapping platform Kindred adds affinity 'Circles,' starting with one for women The company expects users will feel more comfortable sharing their homes with people with whom they have something in common, like gender or employer. - Fast Company

Target joins a rank of companies using a points system to track employee attendanceOther large businesses have implemented similar attendance-tracking systems for employees in recent years. - Fast Company
